title: rubus × pygmaeiformis
intro: Rubus × pygmaeiformis, also known as the compact raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a cross between the fragaria and the rubus plant species. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × pygmaeiformis include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Rubus × pygmaeiformis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
